page_content:
HISP628 Selected Topics in Historic Preservation (3 Credits)

Critical issues in contemporary preservation practice will be examined. Topics will change each year, according to the professor's interests

and the relevance of the course topic, and will include such themes

as: preservation of the everyday built environment, social and ethnic dimensions of historic preservation practice, and preservation of Modern architecture and landscapes. The course will consist of readings, class, discussions, and a substantial individual research project.
